quote: We are all faced with a series of great opportunities brilliantly disguised as impossible situations.  – Charles Swindoll
fact: Arizona was the last of the 48 adjoining continental states to enter the Union.
joke:
Mahatma Gandhi, as you know, walked barefoot most of the time, which produced an impressive set of calluses on his feet. 
He also ate very little, which made him rather frail and with his odd diet, he suffered from bad breath. 
This made him a super calloused fragile mystic hexed by halitosis.
